ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Objective of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trial */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the trial */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the trial */,
  "ethics_approval_date" TEXT /* Date of ethics approval */,
  "trial_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the clinical trial (e.g., I, II, III) */,
  "participant_count" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial the participant is enrolled in */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the participant's medical history */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant in kilograms */,
  "blood_pressure_systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure of the participant */,
  "blood_pressure_diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure of the participant */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the participant */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* Current medications the participant is taking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial the medication is associated with */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the medication (e.g., ACE inhibitor, ARB) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage prescribed for the participant */,
  "administered" TEXT /* Administration route (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medication */,
  "formulation" TEXT /* Formulation type (e.g., tablet, capsule) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration (e.g., daily, twice weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial the result is associated with */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication tested */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the result is associated with */,
  "efficacy_score" REAL /* Score indicating the efficacy of the medication */,
  "adverse_events" TEXT /* Description of any adverse events experienced */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the result was reported */,
  "baseline_bp_systolic" INTEGER /* Baseline systolic blood pressure */,
  "baseline_bp_diastolic" INTEGER /* Baseline diastolic blood pressure */,
  "follow_up_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of follow-up visits */,
  "compliance" REAL /* Compliance rate of the participant with the treatment (0-1 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial the event is related to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant experiencing the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the adverse event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of adverse event (e.g., allergic reaction, dizziness) */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up visit */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the event resolution (e.g., resolved, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced, 3 for full) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data entry) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial the statistic is associated with */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication for which the statistic is recorded */,
  "average_efficacy" REAL /* Average efficacy score of the medication */,
  "average_adverse_events" REAL /* Average number of adverse events reported */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on efficacy score */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the sample */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the efficacy score */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the statistical significance of the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_statistics_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_statistics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)
